label: Task
name: task
description: Benchmark task the dataset is designed to evaluate.

transcription.description: Conversion of textual content in document images into machine-readable text.

information-extraction.description: Extraction of structured information such as persons, companies, locations, or other entities from document content.

document-understanding.description: Identification or classification of structural elements such as advertisements, signatures, or layout regions.

entity-linking.description: Linking extracted entities to external authority records or knowledge bases.

data-correction.description: Correction or normalization of structured data such as XML, JSON, or tabular records.
